name: The ETHGlobal Cannes 2025 finalists are in! We're thrilled to share
snippet: The ETHGlobal Cannes 2025 finalists are in! We're thrilled to share 10 projects that stuck out from 334 built: ⚡️ BeamPay 🛡️ OnlyDanks

name: OnlyDanks - ETHGlobal
snippet: OnlyDanks is a messaging system that lives entirely on the Ethereum blockchain. There are no apps, no servers, and no middlemen.

name: Closing Ceremony & Finalist Demos | ETHGlobal Cannes 2025
ETHGlobal Cannes Hackathon announces 10 finalist  - RootData
snippet: ETHGlobal Cannes Hackathon announces 10 finalist projects, covering areas such as AI and DeFi · BeamPay implements multi-chain ERC20 payments ...

name: ETHGlobal Cannes Finalists Pack
snippet: Each member receives $500 USD of flight reimbursement for hacking in another hackathon in 2025. $500 Reimbursement. Mint to Redeem. Finalist Hoodie logo.

name: Zircuit at ETHGlobal Cannes 2025: Winners and Project Spotlight
snippet: We got a lot of submissions and spent the entire morning meeting with the teams. In the end, we only had 10 minutes to deliberate and choose the winners.
